---
title: "Flights Dashboard"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
jupyter: venv311
# theme: slate
---
```{python}
# CONNECT TO DATABASE AND LOAD DATA
from src.db_connect import ps_connect
conn = ps_connect()
cursor = conn.cursor()

# AIRPORT'S AVINOR
query = """SELECT
    a.date_time_of_departure::date,
    a.departure_airport_iata AS d_iata,
    a.date_time_of_arrival::date,
    a.arrival_airport_iata AS a_iata,
    a.aircraft_type,
    a.seats,

    dep.icao_code AS dep_icao,
    dep.iso_country AS dep_country,

    arr.icao_code AS arr_icao,
    arr.iso_country AS arr_country

FROM avinor_flights a

LEFT JOIN airports dep
    ON dep.iata_code = a.departure_airport_iata

LEFT JOIN airports arr
    ON arr.iata_code = a.arrival_airport_iata;"""
    df_avinor_with_airports = pl.read_database(query,conn)

```
